name: image
description: Single-image VLM workloads exercising Cosmos-Reason2's physical-reasoning prompts (describe, count, reason, structured output). All reference assets/images/bus.jpg relative to the vlm-benchmarks/ directory.

content.text: Describe this scene in one paragraph. Focus on objects, people, and their spatial relationships.
How many people are visible in this image? Count carefully.

messages.content:
You are a helpful assistant. Answer the question in the following format: <think>
your reasoning
</think>

<answer>
your answer
</answer>.

content.text: If I were approaching this scene on foot from the right side, what obstacles or hazards should I be aware of?
List the visible traffic-relevant objects in JSON format: [{"object": name, "position": "left|center|right"}, ...]. Output only the JSON, no prose.
